notes: Two-view layout matches the photo's composition but the silhouettes are distorted with messy fragmented contours and the top view's mantle/fin shape does not match the photo's broad shield fins.
specific_issues: top view mantle reads as a flared trumpet rather than the photo's bulbous mantle with broad lateral fins
arm/tentacle count and arrangement in top view do not match the spread of arms in the photo
eye in top view is missing or barely placed; bottom view eye is small but lacks a clean almond shape with filled pupil
no ring suckers drawn along arms despite being clearly visible in the photo
silhouette broken into many short fragmented strokes rather than a continuous single-weight contour
stipple is scattered randomly rather than concentrated in the chromatophore/shadow fields visible on the mantle
photo-trace clutter (short broken segments) along the mantle and fin edges
bottom view fin is too small/clipped relative to the photo's prominent rhomboid fin
